name: KOEHRING CO. v. HYDE CONSTRUCTION CO., INC., et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in KOEHRING CO. v. HYDE CONSTRUCTION CO., INC., et al. (382 U.S. 362, 1965 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
